race.comment: Siding with BRUTALINA (3) in a tricky race. She hasn't won in a while but is going well in stronger races, giving a good sight behind the smart A Diva when last seen at Cranbourne. Off a break into this but finds a very winnable race and the apprentice can be handlebars down from the inside gate. DANTOOINE (1) has come back well, winning two back and close up again here last time. He maps for every hope on speed and will give a sight. LOVE SYMBOL (11) ran a better race up to this trip last time out, her second run in Australia hacing come over from New Zealand. She can improve again and take holding out. ALBANIAN I AM (2) could surprise fresh albeit over a trip short of his best.
